mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.item_id, r.material_id, r.quantity, r.min_water_amount, r.max_water_amount, r.min_hydration_rate, r.max_hydration_rate, m.name AS materialName, m.unit AS unit, m.is_powder AS isPowder FROM recipes r INNER JOIN materials m ON r.material_id = m.id WHERE r.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY r.id ASC
SELECT origin FROM recipe_origins WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipes ( item_id, material_id, quantity, min_water_amount, max_water_amount, min_hydration_rate, max_hydration_rate ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{detail.materialId}, #{detail.quantity}, #{minWater}, #{maxWater}, #{minRate}, #{maxRate} )
